sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59580" key="kradhfori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρᾰδηφορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n59580.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bearing of fig-tree branches at a festival</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.671e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
